final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: architectural photography, fine art print
Primary request: panoramic view of a famous Zen temple's karesansui (dry landscape) garden in Kyoto, Japan
Scene/backdrop: traditional Japanese Zen temple courtyard with low wooden corridor, ancient earthen wall with moss on top
Subject: meticulously raked white gravel forming concentric circles and ripple patterns symbolizing ocean waves, moss-covered rocks of various shapes representing islands and mountain peaks
Style/medium: architectural photography, wide-angle lens, low-angle perspective
Composition/framing: wide-angle panoramic shot, low angle emphasizing geometric patterns and spatial depth
Lighting/mood: autumn afternoon slanting sunlight, warm beige-white gravel, elongated rock shadows, serene and profound Zen atmosphere
Color palette: warm beige-white gravel, deep green moss, weathered wood browns, muted earthen wall tones, soft autumn gold
Materials/textures: smooth raked gravel with precise patterns, rough moss-covered stone, aged wooden corridor, textured earthen wall with moss
Constraints: preserve the concentric ripple patterns in gravel, maintain the low wooden corridor shadows, keep the mossy rocks as focal points
Avoid: oversaturated colors, modern elements, people, artificial lighting, distorted perspective, watermark
